---
type: data
content_type: jpeg
description: hello_jpeg
---

# English

A raster illustration of the Forge — a hooded smith hammering
luminous fibers at a glowing anvil, with floating equations and
code panels. Used as a smoke-test for the jpeg content_type.
Body is base64-encoded JPEG bytes (resized to 800px on the long
edge, quality 80) — the plugin wraps it in a data URI and embeds
as <img>. Source: Gemini-generated, 2026-05-07.

# Body

